query: CometChat complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: CometChat Review: Real-Time Chat SDK with AI Agents ...
results.content:
### The Negatives

Support response times are the most common complaint. Several reviews mention waiting 2+ days for initial responses. For urgent issues, this can be frustrating.

Some users who purchased older plans feel burned by the shift to subscription pricing. If you bought a lifetime license years ago, the transition to monthly fees probably stings.

The UX could use refinement in some areas. A few reviewers noted that making CometChat look perfect in specific frameworks (like Ionic-Angular) requires extra work.

### The Verdict from Users [...] ### Chat and Messaging

The bread and butter here is solid. One-on-one conversations, group chats, broadcast channels—all the standard stuff you'd expect. But what separates decent chat from frustrating chat is the details: typing indicators that actually work, read receipts that don't lie, message threading that doesn't confuse users, reactions, the ability to edit or delete messages without breaking the conversation flow.

CometChat handles all of this out of the box. The message delivery is reliable thanks to queuing and retry mechanisms, which means your messages get through even when someone's connection is spotty.

### Voice and Video Calling [...] ### The Verdict from Users

Average ratings across platforms hover around 4-4.5 out of 5 stars. The platform clearly works and solves real problems, but like any software, it's not perfect. Most complaints center on support speed and pricing changes rather than core functionality.

## When CometChat Makes Sense (And When It Doesn't)

### Great Fit For:

Healthcare and Telehealth: HIPAA compliance is available on Advanced and Enterprise plans. Secure video consultations, patient-provider messaging, all the compliance boxes checked.

Marketplaces: Connect buyers and sellers with in-app chat. One reviewer running a marketplace saw a 25% boost in successful transactions after implementing CometChat.

results.title: Feedback - CometChat Feedback
results.content: When a user searches for a word/message in the chat and clicks on a search result, the entire page refreshes unexpectedly instead of smoothly navigating to the selected message. This negatively impacts the user experience and breaks the expected navigation flow during message search in React applications using the CometChat UI Kit. As per the CometChat React Search documentation, onMessageClicked should support custom navigation behavior without triggering a full page reload. Requirement: Prevent full page refresh when clicking a search result Allow smooth navigation/scrolling to the selected message Ensure onMessageClicked works correctly for custom navigation handling in SPA-based React applications This enhancement would improve usability and align the behavior with expected React [...] When a user searches for a word/message in the chat and clicks on a search result, the entire page refreshes unexpectedly instead of smoothly navigating to the selected message. This negatively impacts the user experience and breaks the expected navigation flow during message search in React applications using the CometChat UI Kit. As per the CometChat React Search documentation, onMessageClicked should support custom navigation behavior without triggering a full page reload. Requirement: Prevent full page refresh when clicking a search result Allow smooth navigation/scrolling to the selected message Ensure onMessageClicked works correctly for custom navigation handling in SPA-based React applications This enhancement would improve usability and align the behavior with expected React [...] seamless multi-account notification support similar to modern messaging platforms.

results.title: Troubleshooting - CometChat Docs
results.content:
## ​ Installation & Setup

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| `CometChatCalls is not defined` | SDK not installed or not linked | Run `npm install @cometchat/calls-sdk-react-native` and rebuild |
| `init()` fails silently | Invalid App ID or Region | Double-check credentials from the CometChat Dashboard |
| Build fails on iOS | CocoaPods not installed or outdated | Run `cd ios && pod install` after adding the SDK |
| Build fails on Android | Missing native dependencies | Run `npx react-native link` or rebuild with `npx react-native run-android` |

## ​ Authentication [...] ## ​ Authentication

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| `login()` fails with invalid UID | UID doesn’t exist in CometChat | Create the user via Dashboard or REST API first |
| Auth token expired | Token has a limited lifetime | Generate a new auth token and call `login()` again |
| `login()` called before `init()` | SDK not initialized | Always `await CometChatCalls.init()` before calling `login()` |

## ​ Joining a Session [...] ## ​ Audio & Video

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| No audio from remote participants | Audio routing issue | Check Audio Modes for speaker/earpiece configuration |
| Camera not working | Permission denied or another app using camera | Check app permissions in device settings |
| Black video tiles | Camera permission not granted at OS level | Request permissions using `react-native-permissions` or similar library |

## ​ Platform-Specific

results.title: Troubleshooting - CometChat Docs
results.content:
## ​ Authentication

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| `login()` fails with invalid UID | UID doesn’t exist in CometChat | Create the user via Dashboard or REST API first |
| Auth token expired | Token has a limited lifetime | Generate a new auth token and call `login()` again |
| `login()` called before `init()` | SDK not initialized | Always `await CometChatCalls.init()` before calling `login()` |

## ​ Joining a Session [...] ## ​ Installation & Setup

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| `CometChatCalls is not defined` | SDK not installed or not imported | Run `npm install @cometchat/calls-sdk-javascript` and import `CometChatCalls` |
| `init()` fails silently | Invalid App ID or Region | Double-check credentials from the CometChat Dashboard |
| `init()` throws network error | Region mismatch or network issue | Ensure the Region matches your app’s region (`us`, `eu`, `in`, `in-private`) |
| Module not found error | Incorrect import path | Use `import { CometChatCalls } from "@cometchat/calls-sdk-javascript"` |

## ​ Authentication [...] ## ​ HTTPS & Deployment

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
 --- 
| Camera/mic permissions blocked | App not served over HTTPS | Use HTTPS in production. Localhost is exempt during development |
| WebRTC connection fails behind firewall | TURN/STUN servers blocked | Ensure your network allows WebRTC traffic. Contact your network admin |
| SDK works locally but not in production | Mixed content or CORS issues | Ensure all resources are loaded over HTTPS |

## ​ Framework-Specific
